backendCrashed.title: Digivice engine stopped
backendCrashed.hint: Close the app and open it again. If the problem persists, contact the developer.

backend.title: Could not connect to Digivice
backend.hint: Make sure the application started correctly and try again.

emulator.title: Emulator not found
emulator.hint: Open Duckstation, load Digimon World 2003, and enable Export Memory Shared under Debugging.
